{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Noroloth the Herald
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Noroloth the Herald]] is a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
